assertion_results.text: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 1-4: YAML frontmatter with --- delimiters contains name: pandas-data-cleaning and description field

assertion_results.text: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning data cleaning or pandas
assertion_results.evidence: Line 3 description contains literal 'Use when cleaning datasets, preprocessing data, handling missing or null values, deduplicating rows, normalizing column names, converting data types in pandas'

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body covers handling missing values with code examples
assertion_results.evidence: Section '### 3. Handle missing values' (lines 82-102) with strategy table and code examples: df.dropna(), fillna(median), fillna(mean), fillna(mode), fillna constant, ffill(), interpolate(). Also sentinel value replacement code block.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body covers deduplication with code examples
assertion_results.evidence: Section '### 4. Deduplicate rows' (lines 104-121) with code: df.duplicated().sum(), df.drop_duplicates(), drop_duplicates(subset=[...], keep='first'), and near-duplicate normalization example

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body covers column name normalization or type conversion
assertion_results.evidence: Section '### 2. Normalize column names' (lines 62-80) with normalize_columns() function. Section '### 5. Convert types' (lines 123-141) covering string-to-datetime, object-to-numeric, object-to-category, and boolean conversion with code examples.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body uses progressive disclosure by referencing separate files for detailed patterns
assertion_results.evidence: SKILL.md line 53: 'Use scripts/analyze-columns.ts to generate a structured column report' references external script. references/ directory contains cleaning-patterns.md for detailed patterns. scripts/analyze-columns.ts is referenced for column analysis.

assertion_results.text: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertion_results.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 3 test cases (ids 1, 2, 3) each with prompt, expected_output, and assertions arrays

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 202: '## Common mistakes' section with 7-row table covering fillna(0), sentinel values, inplace=True, dedup subset, type conversion order, errors='coerce', and column normalization order

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body contains a workflow or ordered checklist for the cleaning pipeline
assertion_results.evidence: 6 numbered workflow steps: '### 1. Load and inspect', '### 2. Normalize column names', '### 3. Handle missing values', '### 4. Deduplicate rows', '### 5. Convert types', '### 6. Validate and export'. Also a checklist section (lines 156-165) with 8 ordered items.
